---
title: "Presentations"
---

[日本語へ戻る](../presentations.qmd)

## Invited Talks

1. "Presentation Title." Event or Institution, Year.
2. "Presentation Title." Event or Institution, Year.

## Conference Presentations

1. "Presentation Title." Conference Name, Year.
2. "Presentation Title." Conference Name, Year.

## Workshops and Seminars

- Workshop or seminar title, Year.
